name: GOLFTEC Woodbridge
address: 465 Green St Suite 451, Woodbridge Township, NJ 07095
about: GOLFTEC Woodbridge is a high-tech golf training facility specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. Services include golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice sessions with professional PGA-certified coaches. While the specific Woodbridge page appears unavailable, GOLFTEC centers typically offer a structured environment focused on skill improvement through technology, with options for lesson packages and memberships for ongoing access to training bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology for precise swing analysis
Access to PGA award-winning certified coaches for personalized improvement plans
One-stop-shop for both lessons and custom club fitting to optimize performance
Practice memberships available for structured, guided training sessions
Pro shop offering gear at 10% off retail prices

food_and_drink.notes: No food services mentioned; BYOB not indicated
No alcohol services mentioned; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for lessons and fittings, measuring club speed, ball speed, launch angle, and spin rates

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, including demo clubs for use during training sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, and BYOB is not indicated. It's best to plan accordingly for your visit.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on instruction and practice rather than full-course simulation. Swing evaluations and lessons typically last 60 minutes, while practice sessions vary based on membership or package.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers, with technology and coaching designed to help them understand and improve their game.
